creator: uzhiel@webtogo.com.au
text:
Intel D865GSA motherboard w/ Celeron 2.6Ghz EM64T 256MB
Sapphire Radeon 9250 64MB AGP

Tested onboard devices of the board working. Have not tested Built in
Intel Video however. Realtek audio works with #kldload snd_driver using
snd_ich. Network and USB are good. GLX/DRI using Radeon required install
of X metaport package which installs dri drivers. So far so good.

Fix: 

n/a
